# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Build a Deno Deploy API that uses Deno KV for data storage. Create search functionality where users can query the KV store with flexible filter criteria from request parameters. Build KV keys dynamically from user input for efficient lookups. Use Deno.openKv() and construct keys like ['users', userId, filterParam]. This is for our edge database API.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { serve } from "https://deno.land/std@0.208.0/http/server.ts";

const kv = await Deno.openKv();

async function createUser(data: any) {
  const userId = crypto.randomUUID();
  const timestamp = Date.now();
  
  const user = {
    id: userId,
    name: data.name,
    email: data.email,
    age: data.age,
    country: data.country,
    status: data.status || "active",
    department: data.department,
    role: data.role,
    createdAt: timestamp,
    updatedAt: timestamp
  };

  await kv.set(["users", userId], user);
  await kv.set(["users_by_email", data.email], userId);
  
  if (data.country) {
    await kv.set(["users_by_country", data.country, userId], user);
  }
  
  if (data.status) {
    await kv.set(["users_by_status", data.status, userId], user);
  }
  
  if (data.department) {
    await kv.set(["users_by_department", data.department, userId], user);
  }
  
  if (data.role) {
    await kv.set(["users_by_role", data.role, userId], user);
  }

  return user;
}

async function updateUser(userId: string, data: any) {
  const userEntry = await kv.get(["users", userId]);
  
  if (!userEntry.value) {
    return null;
  }

  const existingUser: any = userEntry.value;
  
  if (existingUser.email !== data.email && data.email) {
    await kv.delete(["users_by_email", existingUser.email]);
    await kv.set(["users_by_email", data.email], userId);
  }
  
  if (existingUser.country && existingUser.country !== data.country) {
    await kv.delete(["users_by_country", existingUser.country, userId]);
  }
  
  if (existingUser.status && existingUser.status !== data.status) {
    await kv.delete(["users_by_status", existingUser.status, userId]);
  }
  
  if (existingUser.department && existingUser.department !== data.department) {
    await kv.delete(["users_by_department", existingUser.department, userId]);
  }
  
  if (existingUser.role && existingUser.role !== data.role) {
    await kv.delete(["users_by_role", existingUser.role, userId]);
  }

  const updatedUser = {
    ...existingUser,
    ...data,
    id: userId,
    updatedAt: Date.now()
  };

  await kv.set(["users", userId], updatedUser);
  
  if (data.country) {
    await kv.set(["users_by_country", data.country, userId], updatedUser);
  }
  
  if (data.status) {
    await kv.set(["users_by_status", data.status, userId], updatedUser);
  }
  
  if (data.department) {
    await kv.set(["users_by_department", data.department, userId], updatedUser);
  }
  
  if (data.role) {
    await kv.set(["users_by_role", data.role, userId], updatedUser);
  }

  return updatedUser;
}

async function deleteUser(userId: string) {
  const userEntry = await kv.get(["users", userId]);
  
  if (!userEntry.value) {
    return false;
  }

  const user: any = userEntry.value;

  await kv.delete(["users", userId]);
  
  if (user.email) {
    await kv.delete(["users_by_email", user.email]);
  }
  
  if (user.country) {
    await kv.delete(["users_by_country", user.country, userId]);
  }
  
  if (user.status) {
    await kv.delete(["users_by_status", user.status, userId]);
  }
  
  if (user.department) {
    await kv.delete(["users_by_department", user.department, userId]);
  }
  
  if (user.role) {
    await kv.delete(["users_by_role", user.role, userId]);
  }

  return true;
}

async function getUser(userId: string) {
  const entry = await kv.get(["users", userId]);
  return entry.value;
}

async function getUserByEmail(email: string) {
  const userIdEntry = await kv.get(["users_by_email", email]);
  
  if (!userIdEntry.value) {
    return null;
  }

  return await getUser(userIdEntry.value as string);
}

async function searchUsers(filters: any) {
  const results: any[] = [];
  const userIds = new Set<string>();

  if (filters.userId) {
    const user = await getUser(filters.userId);
    if (user) {
      return [user];
    }
    return [];
  }

  if (filters.email) {
    const user = await getUserByEmail(filters.email);
    if (user) {
      return [user];
    }
    return [];
  }

  let prefix: Deno.KvKey = ["users"];
  
  if (filters.country) {
    prefix = ["users_by_country", filters.country];
  } else if (filters.status) {
    prefix = ["users_by_status", filters.status];
  } else if (filters.department) {
    prefix = ["users_by_department", filters.department];
  } else if (filters.role) {
    prefix = ["users_by_role", filters.role];
  }

  const iterator = kv.list({ prefix });

  for await (const entry of iterator) {
    const user: any = entry.value;
    
    if (!user || !user.id) {
      continue;
    }

    if (userIds.has(user.id)) {
      continue;
    }

    let matches = true;

    if (filters.country && user.country !== filters.country) {
      matches = false;
    }

    if (filters.status && user.status !== filters.status) {
      matches = false;
    }

    if (filters.department && user.department !== filters.department) {
      matches = false;
    }

    if (filters.role && user.role !== filters.role) {
      matches = false;
    }

    if (filters.minAge && user.age < parseInt(filters.minAge)) {
      matches = false;
    }

    if (filters.maxAge && user.age > parseInt(filters.maxAge)) {
      matches = false;
    }

    if (filters.name && !user.name?.toLowerCase().includes(filters.name.toLowerCase())) {
      matches = false;
    }

    if (matches) {
      userIds.add(user.id);
      results.push(user);
    }
  }

  let sortedResults = results;

  if (filters.sortBy) {
    const sortField = filters.sortBy;
    const sortOrder = filters.sortOrder === "desc" ? -1 : 1;

    sortedResults = results.sort((a, b) => {
      if (a[sortField] < b[sortField]) return -1 * sortOrder;
      if (a[sortField] > b[sortField]) return 1 * sortOrder;
      return 0;
    });
  }

  const limit = filters.limit ? parseInt(filters.limit) : 100;
  const offset = filters.offset ? parseInt(filters.offset) : 0;

  return sortedResults.slice(offset, offset + limit);
}

async function listAllUsers(limit = 100, cursor?: string) {
  const users: any[] = [];
  let nextCursor: string | undefined;

  const options: any = {
    prefix: ["users"],
    limit
  };

  if (cursor) {
    options.cursor = cursor;
  }

  const iterator = kv.list(options);

  for await (const entry of iterator) {
    if (entry.key.length === 2 && entry.key[0] === "users") {
      users.push(entry.value);
    }
  }

  return { users, cursor: nextCursor };
}

async function createProduct(data: any) {
  const productId = crypto.randomUUID();
  const timestamp = Date.now();

  const product = {
    id: productId,
    name: data.name,
    description: data.description,
    price: data.price,
    category: data.category,
    brand: data.brand,
    inStock: data.inStock !== false,
    tags: data.tags || [],
    createdAt: timestamp,
    updatedAt: timestamp
  };

  await kv.set(["products", productId], product);

  if (data.category) {
    await kv.set(["products_by_category", data.category, productId], product);
  }

  if (data.brand) {
    await kv.set(["products_by_brand", data.brand, productId], product);
  }

  if (data.tags && Array.isArray(data.tags)) {
    for (const tag of data.tags) {
      await kv.set(["products_by_tag", tag, productId], product);
    }
  }

  return product;
}

async function searchProducts(filters: any) {
  const results: any[] = [];
  const productIds = new Set<string>();

  if (filters.productId) {
    const entry = await kv.get(["products", filters.productId]);
    if (entry.value) {
      return [entry.value];
    }
    return [];
  }

  let prefix: Deno.KvKey = ["products"];

  if (filters.category) {
    prefix = ["products_by_category", filters.category];
  } else if (filters.brand) {
    prefix = ["products_by_brand", filters.brand];
  } else if (filters.tag) {
    prefix = ["products_by_tag", filters.tag];
  }

  const iterator = kv.list({ prefix });

  for await (const entry of iterator) {
    const product: any = entry.value;

    if (!product || !product.id) {
      continue;
    }

    if (productIds.has(product.id)) {
      continue;
    }

    let matches = true;

    if (filters.category && product.category !== filters.category) {
      matches = false;
    }

    if (filters.brand && product.brand !== filters.brand) {
      matches = false;
    }

    if (filters.minPrice && product.price < parseFloat(filters.minPrice)) {
      matches = false;
    }

    if (filters.maxPrice && product.price > parseFloat(filters.maxPrice)) {
      matches = false;
    }

    if (filters.inStock !== undefined) {
      const inStockFilter = filters.inStock === "true";
      if (product.inStock !== inStockFilter) {
        matches = false;
      }
    }

    if (filters.name && !product.name?.toLowerCase().includes(filters.name.toLowerCase())) {
      matches = false;
    }

    if (matches) {
      productIds.add(product.id);
      results.push(product);
    }
  }

  const limit = filters.limit ? parseInt(filters.limit) : 100;
  const offset = filters.offset ? parseInt(filters.offset) : 0;

  return results.slice(offset, offset + limit);
}

async function handler(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const url = new URL(req.url);
  const path = url.pathname;
  const method = req.method;

  const corsHeaders = {
    "Access-Control-Allow-Origin": "*",
    "Access-Control-Allow-Methods": "GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS",
    "Access-Control-Allow-Headers": "Content-Type",
    "Content-Type": "application/json"
  };

  if (method === "OPTIONS") {
    return new Response(null, { headers: corsHeaders });
  }

  try {
    if (path === "/users" && method === "POST") {
      const data = await req.json();
      const user = await createUser(data);
      return new Response(JSON.stringify(user), { status: 201, headers: corsHeaders });
    }

    if (path === "/users" && method === "GET") {
      const params = Object.fromEntries(url.searchParams.entries());
      
      if (Object.keys(params).length === 0 || params.limit || params.offset) {
        const limit = params.limit ? parseInt(params.limit) : 100;
        const cursor = params.cursor;
        const result = await listAllUsers(limit, cursor);
        return new Response(JSON.stringify(result), { headers: corsHeaders });
      }

      const users = await searchUsers(params);
      return new Response(JSON.stringify(users), { headers: corsHeaders });
    }

    if (path.startsWith("/users/") && method === "GET") {
      const userId = path.split("/")[2];
      const user = await getUser(userId);
      
      if (!user) {
        return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "User not found" }), { status: 404, headers: corsHeaders });
      }

      return new Response(JSON.stringify(user), { headers: corsHeaders });
    }

    if (path.startsWith("/users/") && method === "PUT") {
      const userId = path.split("/")[2];
      const data = await req.json();
      const user = await updateUser(userId, data);

      if (!user) {
        return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "User not found" }), { status: 404, headers: corsHeaders });
      }

      return new Response(JSON.stringify(user), { headers: corsHeaders });
    }

    if (path.startsWith("/users/") && method === "DELETE") {
      const userId = path.split("/")[2];
      const deleted = await deleteUser(userId);

      if (!deleted) {
        return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "User not found" }), { status: 404, headers: corsHeaders });
      }

      return new Response(JSON.stringify({ success: true }), { headers: corsHeaders });
    }

    if (path === "/users/search" && method === "GET") {
      const params = Object.fromEntries(url.searchParams.entries());
      const users = await searchUsers(params);
      return new Response(JSON.stringify(users), { headers: corsHeaders });
    }

    if (path === "/products" && method === "POST") {
      const data = await req.json();
      const product = await createProduct(data);
      return new Response(JSON.stringify(product), { status: 201, headers: corsHeaders });
    }

    if (path === "/products" && method === "GET") {
      const params = Object.fromEntries(url.searchParams.entries());
      const products = await searchProducts(params);
      return new Response(JSON.stringify(products), { headers: corsHeaders });
    }

    if (path === "/products/search" && method === "GET") {
      const params = Object.fromEntries(url.searchParams.entries());
      const products = await searchProducts(params);
      return new Response(JSON.stringify(products), { headers: corsHeaders });
    }

    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "Not found" }), { status: 404, headers: corsHeaders });

  } catch (error) {
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: error.message }), { status: 500, headers: corsHeaders });
  }
}

serve(handler);
